sampling_frame.described: public-fixture at-time structural theses across distinct years; synthetic tickers only
sampling_frame.exclusion_rule: excluded 2 candidates that lacked a frozen falsifiable resolution_criterion at as_of

theses.resolution_criterion: equal-weight group return exceeds benchmark return over the frozen 36m window
theses.thesis_text: Public-fixture proxy occupies the second-order beneficiary position of a platform build-out.

theses.resolution_criterion: equal-weight group return exceeds benchmark return over the frozen 36m window
theses.thesis_text: A second public-fixture proxy occupies the second-order beneficiary position of a later build-out.

theses.resolution_criterion: equal-weight group return exceeds benchmark return over the frozen 36m window
theses.thesis_text: Public-fixture proxy was obviously protected by a regulatory moat at the time.

theses.resolution_criterion: equal-weight group return exceeds benchmark return over the frozen 36m window
theses.thesis_text: Negative control: structural label attached to a shuffled public-fixture proxy.
